description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of blue, white, and black panels, with a prominent black Nike Swoosh logo on the side. The upper is constructed from leather, with visible creasing and wear, especially around the toe box and ankle collar. The shoe has a padded black tongue and collar, and black laces threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The midsole is white with a blue outsole, and the tread is only partially visible. The lateral side displays a winged basketball logo embossed in black. The overall appearance suggests a classic basketball shoe design, likely inspired by or modeled after the Air Jordan 1 silhouette.
description: A high-top, blue, white, and black leather sneaker with a black Nike Swoosh and visible wear, featuring a padded collar and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black Nike Swoosh, blue and white leather panels, and the winged basketball logo near the ankle.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the blue heel, black collar, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the Swoosh, blue and white panels, and the shoe's overall worn texture.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the toe box perforations, black laces, and the padded tongue.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on the side; black winged basketball logo near the ankle collar.
